message:
fix(parser,svg): improve DOT edge attribute parsing and fix SVG detail tier selection

Concurrent agent fixes:
- dot_parser.rs: Enhanced edge attribute parsing with better handling
  of arrow styles, edge labels, and compound attribute lists (+56 lines)
- render-svg/lib.rs: Fix off-by-one in adaptive detail tier threshold
  calculation for node-count-based tier selection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
